meta.name: 科技未来
meta.description: 深钴蓝主色，紧凑信息密度，H1 深色背景色块如终端标题栏，左侧边框层级递进，适合科技/AI/编程类内容

styles.container: max-width: 720px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 8px; font-family: PingFang SC,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Helvetica Neue,Hiragino Sans GB,Microsoft YaHei UI,Microsoft YaHei,Arial,sans-serif; font-size: 16px; line-height: 1.7 !important; word-wrap: break-word; color: #2c2c2c;
styles.h1: font-size: 24px; font-weight: 700; color: #ffffff !important; margin-top: 44px !important; margin-bottom: 24px !important; line-height: 1.35em !important; word-break: break-all; letter-spacing: 0.02em; background-color: #1a2332; padding: 18px 20px; border-left: 4px solid #1a56db; font-family: PingFang SC,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Helvetica Neue,Hiragino Sans GB,Microsoft YaHei UI,Microsoft YaHei,Arial,sans-serif;
styles.h2: font-size: 21px; font-weight: 700; color: #1a56db !important; margin-top: 38px !important; margin-bottom: 18px !important; line-height: 1.4em !important; word-break: break-all; letter-spacing: 0.01em; padding: 10px 0 10px 14px; border-left: 3px solid #1a56db; background: linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(26,86,219,0.07) 0%, transparent 60%); font-family: PingFang SC,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Helvetica Neue,Hiragino Sans GB,Microsoft YaHei UI,Microsoft YaHei,Arial,sans-serif;
styles.h3: font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; color: #1a56db !important; margin-top: 30px !important; margin-bottom: 14px !important; line-height: 1.4em !important; word-break: break-all; padding-left: 12px; border-left: 2px solid rgba(26,86,219,0.5); font-family: PingFang SC,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Helvetica Neue,Hiragino Sans GB,Microsoft YaHei UI,Microsoft YaHei,Arial,sans-serif;
styles.h4: font-size: 17px; font-weight: 600; color: #1a56db !important; margin-top: 24px !important; margin-bottom: 12px !important; line-height: 1.4em !important; word-break: break-all; padding-left: 10px; border-left: 2px solid rgba(26,86,219,0.3); font-family: PingFang SC,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Helvetica Neue,Hiragino Sans GB,Microsoft YaHei UI,Microsoft YaHei,Arial,sans-serif;
styles.h5: font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; color: #2c4a7c !important; margin-top: 20px !important; margin-bottom: 10px !important; line-height: 1.4em !important; word-break: break-all; font-family: PingFang SC,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Helvetica Neue,Hiragino Sans GB,Microsoft YaHei UI,Microsoft YaHei,Arial,sans-serif;
styles.h6: font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600; color: #2c4a7c !important; margin-top: 16px !important; margin-bottom: 10px !important; line-height: 1.4em !important; word-break: break-all; font-family: PingFang SC,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Helvetica Neue,Hiragino Sans GB,Microsoft YaHei UI,Microsoft YaHei,Arial,sans-serif;
styles.p: margin: 5px 0 18px !important; line-height: 1.7em !important; text-align: start !important; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; color: #2c2c2c !important; word-break: break-all; font-family: PingFang SC,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Helvetica Neue,Hiragino Sans GB,Microsoft YaHei UI,Microsoft YaHei,Arial,sans-serif;
styles.strong: font-weight: 700; color: #1a56db !important; font-family: PingFang SC,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Helvetica Neue,Hiragino Sans GB,Microsoft YaHei UI,Microsoft YaHei,Arial,sans-serif;
styles.em: font-style: italic; color: #4a5568 !important; font-family: PingFang SC,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Helvetica Neue,Hiragino Sans GB,Microsoft YaHei UI,Microsoft YaHei,Arial,sans-serif;
styles.strike: text-decoration: line-through; opacity: 0.5; font-family: PingFang SC,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Helvetica Neue,Hiragino Sans GB,Microsoft YaHei UI,Microsoft YaHei,Arial,sans-serif;
styles.u: text-decoration: underline; text-decoration-color: rgba(26,86,219,0.4); text-underline-offset: 3px; font-family: PingFang SC,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Helvetica Neue,Hiragino Sans GB,Microsoft YaHei UI,Microsoft YaHei,Arial,sans-serif;
styles.a: color: #1a56db !important; text-decoration: none; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(26,86,219,0.35); padding-bottom: 1px; font-family: PingFang SC,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Helvetica Neue,Hiragino Sans GB,Microsoft YaHei UI,Microsoft YaHei,Arial,sans-serif;
styles.ul: margin: 8px 0 !important; padding-left: 22px; list-style-type: disc; color: #1a56db; font-family: PingFang SC,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Helvetica Neue,Hiragino Sans GB,Microsoft YaHei UI,Microsoft YaHei,Arial,sans-serif;
styles.ol: margin: 8px 0 !important; padding-left: 22px; list-style-type: decimal; color: #1a56db; font-family: PingFang SC,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Helvetica Neue,Hiragino Sans GB,Microsoft YaHei UI,Microsoft YaHei,Arial,sans-serif;
styles.li: margin: 3px 0; line-height: 1.7 !important; font-family: PingFang SC,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Helvetica Neue,Hiragino Sans GB,Microsoft YaHei UI,Microsoft YaHei,Arial,sans-serif;
styles.liText: color: #2c2c2c; font-family: PingFang SC,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Helvetica Neue,Hiragino Sans GB,Microsoft YaHei UI,Microsoft YaHei,Arial,sans-serif;
styles.taskList: margin: 8px 0 !important; padding-left: 8px; list-style: none; font-family: PingFang SC,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Helvetica Neue,Hiragino Sans GB,Microsoft YaHei UI,Microsoft YaHei,Arial,sans-serif;
styles.taskListItem: line-height: 1.7 !important; list-style: none; font-family: PingFang SC,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Helvetica Neue,Hiragino Sans GB,Microsoft YaHei UI,Microsoft YaHei,Arial,sans-serif;
styles.taskListItemCheckbox: margin-right: 10px; width: 16px; height: 16px; vertical-align: middle; cursor: pointer; accent-color: #1a56db;
styles.blockquote: margin: 4px 0; padding: 14px 14px 1px 14px !important; border-left: 3px solid #1a56db; background-color: rgba(26,86,219,0.04) !important; color: #4a5568 !important; font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.7 !important; font-family: PingFang SC,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Helvetica Neue,Hiragino Sans GB,Microsoft YaHei UI,Microsoft YaHei,Arial,sans-serif;
styles.code: font-family: "SF Mono", Consolas, Monaco, monospace; font-size: 14px; padding: 2px 5px; background-color: rgba(26,35,50,0.08) !important; color: #1a56db !important; border-radius: 2px;
styles.pre: margin: 24px 0; padding: 16px; background-color: rgba(26,35,50,0.04) !important; border-radius: 0; overflow-x: auto; line-height: 1.6 !important; border: 1px solid rgba(26,35,50,0.1);
styles.hr: margin: 2.5rem auto; border: none; height: 1px; width: 100%; background: linear-gradient(to right, #1a56db, rgba(26,86,219,0.15), transparent);
styles.img: max-width: 100%; max-height: 600px !important; height: auto; display: block; margin: 24px auto; border: 1px solid rgba(26,35,50,0.08);
styles.table: min-width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; font-size: 15px; font-family: PingFang SC,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Helvetica Neue,Hiragino Sans GB,Microsoft YaHei UI,Microsoft YaHei,Arial,sans-serif;
styles.th: background-color: #1a2332 !important; padding: 12px 16px; text-align: left; font-weight: 600; font-size: 15px; color: #ffffff !important; border: 1px solid rgba(26,35,50,0.15); word-break: keep-all; font-family: PingFang SC,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Helvetica Neue,Hiragino Sans GB,Microsoft YaHei UI,Microsoft YaHei,Arial,sans-serif;
styles.td: padding: 12px 16px; font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.7; background: #ffffff !important; color: #2c2c2c !important; border: 1px solid rgba(26,35,50,0.1); word-break: keep-all; font-family: PingFang SC,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Helvetica Neue,Hiragino Sans GB,Microsoft YaHei UI,Microsoft YaHei,Arial,sans-serif;
styles.codeBlockPre: background-color: #1a2332; padding: 0; border-radius: 0; overflow-x: auto; overflow-y: hidden; margin: 24px 0; border-left: 3px solid #1a56db;
styles.codeBlockCode: color: #d4dae4; font-family: "SF Mono", Consolas, Monaco, monospace; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.6; display: block; white-space: pre; padding: 18px 20px;
